# daytona_start_sandbox (Action)

Starts a Daytona sandbox, or restores it from archived state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
action "daytona_start_sandbox" "example" {
  config {
    sandbox_id_or_name = "sandbox-id-or-name"
  }
}
```

<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id_or_name` (String) Daytona sandbox ID or name.

### Optional

- `organization_id` (String) Daytona organization ID to send as `X-Daytona-Organization-ID` for this action. Defaults to the provider-level organization ID when configured.
